tagline: Custom Vinyl & Gunite Pools Built for Your Backyard

hero.headline: 40 Years of Building Dream Pools
hero.subheadline: Since 1986, B&B Pools has been the Upstate's most trusted name in custom vinyl and gunite pool construction. Family-owned, award-winning, and dedicated to making your backyard extraordinary.
badges: Pool & Hot Tub Alliance Gold Winner
Best of the Upstate - Greenville News
checkmarks: Custom designs for every backyard and budget
Hands-on owner involvement from start to finish
Full-service retail center for ongoing pool care

services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs, Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From custom pool construction to ongoing maintenance and a fully stocked retail center, B&B Pools handles it all.

cards.title: Custom Vinyl Pools
cards.description: Beautiful vinyl liner pools designed around your space, lifestyle, and budget - with patterns and shapes you won't find anywhere else.

cards.title: Gunite Pool Construction
cards.description: Premium concrete pools with unlimited design flexibility - waterfalls, tanning ledges, infinity edges, and any shape you can imagine.

cards.title: Pool Renovation
cards.description: Breathe new life into your existing pool with resurfacing, liner replacement, updated coping, tile work, and modern deck upgrades.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Fast, reliable repair for pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation equipment - keeping your pool running smoothly.

cards.title: Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Hassle-free pool care with scheduled cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks so you can just enjoy the water.

cards.title: Retail Pool Supply Store
cards.description: Visit our Pelzer retail center for chemicals, parts, accessories, and expert advice from people who actually build pools.

steps.title: Free Backyard Consultation
steps.description: We visit your property, discuss your vision, and help you choose between vinyl or gunite - with honest guidance on what works best for your space and budget.

steps.title: Custom Design & Build
steps.description: Jerry and the B&B crew handle every detail - from permits and excavation to plumbing, decking, and final finishes - with regular updates along the way.

steps.title: Enjoy Your New Pool
steps.description: We walk you through everything, stock your first round of chemicals from our retail center, and stay available for maintenance and support for years to come.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 1986
about.headline: Built on Relationships, Not Just Pools
about.description: When Jerry Bowers started building pools in 1982, he made a simple promise: treat every customer's backyard like it was his own. Four decades later, that promise still drives everything we do at B&B Pools. We're not a franchise or a national chain - we're your neighbors in Pelzer, and we take pride in every single pool we build. From your first consultation to years of ongoing support at our retail center, you'll always deal with people who genuinely care about getting it right.

features.title: Owner-Operated
features.description: Jerry is personally involved in every project from design through final walkthrough.

features.title: Award-Winning Quality
features.description: Multiple industry awards including Pool & Hot Tub Alliance Gold and Best of the Upstate.

features.title: Community Roots
features.description: Serving Greenville, Anderson, Simpsonville & Spartanburg communities since 1986.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pool Investment
pricing.subtitle: Every B&B pool is custom-built, so pricing reflects your unique design. We provide detailed, no-surprise proposals so you know exactly what you're investing in before we break ground.

guarantee.headline: Our White-Glove Promise
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build with the same care we've shown for over 40 years. If something isn't right, we make it right - period. From construction quality to customer communication, our reputation in Upstate South Carolina is our most valuable asset, and we protect it on every project.

faqs.question: What's the difference between a vinyl liner pool and a gunite pool?
faqs.answer: Vinyl liner pools are more budget-friendly with a smooth surface and fast installation. Gunite (concrete) pools offer unlimited design flexibility and last decades with proper care. During your free consultation, we'll help you decide which is the best fit for your backyard and budget.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Vinyl liner pools typically take 4-6 weeks, while gunite pools take 8-12 weeks depending on complexity. Weather and permits can affect timelines, but we keep you updated every step of the way with clear communication throughout the process.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our maintenance team and retail center serve all pool owners in the Upstate area - regardless of who built your pool. We're happy to help with repairs, equipment upgrades, chemicals, and weekly maintenance.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Upstate South Carolina region including Greenville, Anderson, Simpsonville, Spartanburg, Pelzer, and surrounding communities. We've been building pools across this region since 1986.

faqs.question: Can I visit your retail store without an appointment?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our Pelzer retail center is open to walk-ins during business hours. Bring in a water sample and we'll test it for free and recommend exactly what your pool needs. We carry chemicals, parts, equipment, and accessories from top brands.

testimonials.name: Tom J.
testimonials.text: Attention to every detail. We were given white-glove treatment. They went as far as removing their shoes as to not dirty our deck in later parts of construction.

testimonials.name: Sonya B.
testimonials.text: From start to finish, the entire process was seamless. The communication was excellent and everything was coordinated perfectly.

testimonials.name: Kim S.
testimonials.text: The entire staff - from installers to ownership - was professional, responsive, and always available to answer questions.

contact.headline: Let's Build Your Dream Pool
contact.subtitle: Get a free backyard consultation with Jerry and the B&B team. We'll help you choose the right pool type, design, and budget - no pressure, just honest advice from 40 years of experience.
benefits: Free on-site backyard evaluation and design consultation
Detailed proposal with transparent pricing - no hidden costs
Direct access to the owner throughout your entire project

footer.description: B&B Pools, Inc. has been building custom vinyl and gunite pools in Upstate South Carolina since 1986. Family-owned, award-winning, and committed to turning your backyard into your favorite place to be.
footer.service_area: Proudly serving Greenville, Anderson, Simpsonville, Spartanburg, Pelzer & all of Upstate South Carolina
